keys.description: The Attribution row for a subject. Read hot by AttributionResolver on every attribution-bearing request. 5-min TTL because we invalidate aggressively on write.

The frozen AttributionSnapshot jsonb blob emitted by AttributionSnapshotBuilder.build(). Downstream modules read this on every event-create; caching avoids rebuilding the same blob N times per request.
Denormalised touchpoint_count for a profile. Feeds the rollup + the churn detection. Invalidated on every touchpoint create.
Most-recent N touchpoints for a subject (limit ∈ {10, 25, 50}). Feeds the my-attribution timeline widget.
Campaign performance rollup per tenant per (hour / day / week / month) window. window ∈ {1h, 24h, 7d, 30d}. Materialised by CampaignRollupAggregatorJob hourly.
Deep-dive on a single campaign. Feeds the campaign-detail dashboard.
Top N campaigns by conversion count. Feeds the tenant dashboard homepage widget.
Count of profiles per lifecycle_state (anonymous / identified / converted / churned). Feeds the lifecycle-summary card on the attribution dashboard.
Daily count of consent-suppressed capture attempts. Feeds the compliance suppression-report.
The 5-click-ID mapping catalog (gclid → google, fbclid → meta, ...). Read hot by ClickIdExtractor + AttributionSnapshotBuilder. Very long TTL — the catalog changes only on config-file edit.
